gapsPlanFlag.description: Plan-set handler for --gaps flag that produces gap-closure PLAN.md files for a merged set with remaining gaps.

gapsExecuteFlag.description: Execute-set handler for --gaps flag that runs only gap-closure waves.

merged-status-preserved.description: Gap-closure workflow never changes a set's status from 'merged' -- it operates as an overlay on the existing lifecycle

gap-waves-numbered-after-existing.description: Gap-closure waves are numbered sequentially after the last existing wave

no-re-execution-of-completed-waves.description: execute-set --gaps only executes gap-closure waves, never re-executes previously completed waves

definition.scope: Implement the --gaps flag in plan-set and execute-set skills so merged sets with remaining gaps can undergo targeted gap-closure planning and execution.

tasks.description: Implement --gaps flag parsing in plan-set SKILL.md
tasks.acceptance: Flag recognized and routed to gap-closure handler

tasks.description: Allow merged status in plan-set when --gaps is present
tasks.acceptance: No 'planning is complete' error for merged sets with --gaps

tasks.description: Generate gap-closure PLAN.md files with correct wave numbering
tasks.acceptance: Gap waves numbered after existing waves
Merged set with gaps -> plan -> execute -> gaps resolved

acceptance: Merged sets with gaps can be re-planned and re-executed via --gaps flag
Existing plan-set and execute-set behavior unchanged without --gaps
